case_title: SHUHENG LU VS. DAVID KIT BUN MEI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---AL DONG NI. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, SHUHENG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,317.42 FILED BY LU, SHUHENG AS TO DEFENDANT BUN MEI, DAVID KIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LU, SHUHENG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUN MEI, DAVID KIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
